headline: Qualcomm (QCOM) Valuation Check After Nvidia RTX Spark Competition And New AI Growth Plans
summary: QUALCOMM (QCOM) is back in focus after Nvidia’s new RTX Spark superchip sharpened competition in Windows PCs, pressuring Qualcomm’s Snapdragon franchise even as the company expands its efforts in data center and automotive AI. See our latest analysis for QUALCOMM. Qualcomm’s share price has been volatile around the RTX Spark news, with recent sessions swinging between profit taking and AI driven rallies. The stock currently reflects strong short term momentum and solid multi year total...

headline: Taiwan Semiconductor Delivers 2,095% Gain Over 10 Years. Will It Continue To Outperform?
summary: A decade ago, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (NYSE: TSM) was respected but boring. It made chips for Apple, Qualcomm, and a long list of fabless designers, and the market valued it like a cyclical industrial. Then the node race got serious. TSMC pulled away from Samsung and Intel at 7nm, then 5nm, then 3nm, and the ... Taiwan Semiconductor Delivers 2,095% Gain Over 10 Years. Will It Continue To Outperform?
